code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut which = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false

  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if byte >= 48 and byte <= 57
        if not in_num
          cur = byte - 48
          in_num = true
        else
          cur = cur * 10 + (byte - 48)
        end
      else if byte == 45 and not in_num
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if byte == 43 and not in_num
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          if which == 0
            a = cur * sign
            which = 1
          else
            b = cur * sign
          end
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_num
    if which == 0
      a = cur * sign
    else
      b = cur * sign
    end
  end

  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
end
